correct

correct

correct

Review Note
Reason
The PRIMARY localized display crop shows '0.071', but the CONTEXT original full photo clearly shows '0.647'. As per the fail-safe policy, when crop and context disagree, the interpretation matching the complete display row in the original full photo (CONTEXT) is preferred. The CONTEXT image provides a clear and unambiguous reading of '0.647'. Structured verifier confirmed the same reading.
Correct

Structured verifier confirmed the same reading.
